run_summary.summary: 💸 Both Whisker and JLab are moving toward payment via Tipalti! On Whisker: Liz replied to Cheyenne this morning with payment preference, Cheyenne confirmed the invoice was submitted to accounting and that an ACH invite was coming — and it did (Whisker Accounting just sent a Tipalti portal invite, expires May 27). On JLab: their accounting team sent TWO Tipalti payment portal invitations today — this one's URGENT, the link expires in just 7 days (May 4). Both need Tipalti registration to get paid, but JLab is the priority.

suggestions.message: 🚨 URGENT: JLab Accounting (ap@jlabaudio.com) sent a Tipalti payment portal invitation — the link expires in 7 DAYS (May 4). Register ASAP at suppliers.tipalti.com/JLAB — you'll need contact details, banking info (routing + account), and tax info (EIN/W-9). Don't let this one slip!

Whisker Accounting (accounting@whisker.com) sent a Tipalti vendor portal invite to set up ACH payment for the $2,000. Less urgent than JLab — link expires May 27 (30 days). Same process: contact info, banking details, tax info. You can also reach them at 248-564-2067.

deals.next_action: Register on JLab's Tipalti payment portal — link expires May 4 (URGENT!)
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: JLab Accounting (ap@jlabaudio.com) sent Tipalti payment portal invitation x2. URGENT — link expires May 4 (7 days). Must register to receive payment: contact info, payment method + banking details (routing/account), and tax identity (W-9/EIN). Future login: suppliers.tipalti.com/jlab.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: JLab Accounting sent Tipalti payment portal invite (expires May 4 — 7 days). Register ASAP to receive payment.

deals.next_action: Register on Whisker's Tipalti vendor portal to complete ACH payment setup (link expires May 27)
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz replied to Cheyenne with payment preference. Cheyenne confirmed invoice submitted to Whisker accounting — $2,000 processing. Whisker Accounting (accounting@whisker.com / 248-564-2067) sent Tipalti vendor portal invite to complete ACH setup. Link expires in 30 days (May 27). After registering, invoices go to APInvoices@whisker.com; other comms to Accounting@whisker.com.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: Cheyenne confirmed invoice submitted to Whisker accounting. Whisker sent Tipalti vendor portal invite — register to receive $2,000 via ACH.
